VINIT.justification: The state before any inductive type or ordinal value is defined in the Lean environment.

TANCH.justification: The final cardinality of 17,280,000 which bounds the entire structural type space.

AFWD.justification: The directed mapping from 3 to 4 to 5 in the Arithmetic Ouroboros.

AREV.justification: The reverse transformation that closes the successor cycle back to the base family.

CLINK.justification: The sequential chaining of polarity values under the tensor bottleneck rule.

IMSCRIB.justification: The identity of the successor cycle where the exponent equals the primitive count.

FSPLIT.justification: The branching of a system state into distinct O-tiers based on gate primitives.

FFUSE.justification: The reconstitution of a unified structural type from its boundary and bulk components.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative attainment of the Special Frobenius tier.

EVALF.justification: The failure to reach criticality or topological protection.

ENGAGR.justification: Complex-axis criticality requiring analytic continuation where stability and instability are held simultaneously.

IFIX.justification: The permanent fixation of structural constraints like Axiom D into the kernel.

phase_3.void_description: uninitialized Lean environment without primitive definitions

phase_3.false_description: inconsistent type assignment violating Axiom C or Axiom D

steps.domain_action: initialize the empty Lean namespace for Imscribing.Primitives
define the 12-primitive grammar as a self-referential foundational set
fix the ordinal ordering of Dimensionality from dead to if'
fix the ordinal ordering of Relational from ado to ian
fix the ordinal ordering of Grammar from vow to ooze
fix the ordinal ordering of Chirality from fee to wool
fix the ordinal ordering of Protection from awe to zoo
fix the ordinal ordering of Topology from judge to are
fix the ordinal ordering of Polarity from church to or'
fix the ordinal ordering of Criticality from woe to haha
fix the ordinal ordering of KineticChar from yea to air
fix the ordinal ordering of Fidelity from age to peep
fix the ordinal ordering of Granularity from bib to ice
fix the ordinal ordering of Stoichiometry from hung to up
compose the product of family cardinalities 3³ * 4⁵ * 5⁴
anchor the system at the crystal_total of 17,280,000 types
evaluate the system state at the monad criticality gate
identify the presence of the or' Frobenius polarity
map the holographic dimensionality if' to the boundary
recognize the holographic topology are as the bulk encoding
apply holographic_closure_forces_frobenius to recover the O_inf state
record the resulting OuroboricityTier in the permanent kernel state
